task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NextGen Connect Administrator, a channel named 'Provider_Enrichment' is visible in the Channels list or the channel editor tab.

task_completion.description: Configure the Source to read from the inbound directory every 5 seconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Source tab, the Connector Type is 'File Reader', the Directory is '/home/ga/inbound_hl7', and the Polling Frequency is set to 5000 ms (or 5 seconds).

task_completion.description: Configure the Destination to write to the outbound directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Destinations tab, the Connector Type is 'File Writer' and the Directory is '/home/ga/outbound_hl7'.

task_completion.description: Load CSV data into the Global Channel Map in the Deploy script
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Scripts tab -> Deploy script, there is JavaScript code that reads '/home/ga/reference/providers.csv', parses the CSV, and stores the data using 'globalChannelMap.put' with the ProviderID as the key.

task_completion.description: Populate PV1-7.2 and PV1-7.3 using the cached map in the transformer
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the channel's Transformer, there is a JavaScript step that retrieves data using 'globalChannelMap.get' with the PV1-7.1 field, and assigns the retrieved last name and first name to PV1-7.2 and PV1-7.3 respectively.

integrity.description: Agent used the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NextGen Connect Administrator interface being used to configure the channel, rather than editing XML files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode provider names
integrity.visual_evidence: The transformer script dynamically looks up the provider names using the map and does not contain hardcoded names.

integrity.description: Agent did not access the reference file during message transformation
integrity.visual_evidence: The transformer script does not contain file reading operations (e.g., java.io.File, FileUtil.read). File reading should only be visible in the Deploy script.
